creator: ak@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 222686
sync with NetBSD upstream

Sync unzip in the base with the upstream from NetBSD (rev1.27),
mostly content of PR 244181 except GNUC compat part, which
needed more work and testing:
- Add support for password protected zip archives
- Use success/failure macro in exit()
- Mention ZIPX format in unzip(1)
